actionable_ideas: Improve the login process by re-evaluating the necessity of selfies for authentication
Optimize the app's performance to address slow loading times and errors
Enhance the chart functionality and consider adding more time frame options

verbatim_quotes.quote: Amazing app! Clean interface, smooth performance, and easy investing experience.
